title: lycium parishii var. modestum
intro: Lycium parishii var. modestum, also known as Himalayan Goji or Red Goji, is a variety of the Lycium parishii plant, a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve eye health. The health benefits of Lycium parishii var. modestum include reducing the risk of age-related macular degeneration, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the body's natural antioxidant defenses. Lycium parishii var. modestum can be prepared for herbal use through teas, capsules, or extracts, although its efficacy and safety as a dietary supplement have not been extensively scientifically studied.
